claims.detail: Simulator critic claim: privileged paths require documented mitigations and secondary sign-off.

findings.description: Long-lived service principals for CI remain in two pipelines; workload identity federation is only partially adopted.
findings.recommendation: Migrate remaining connections and enforce expiration alerts on any legacy secrets.

findings.description: Evidence packs are thorough but omit explicit recovery-time validation for the integration hub failover drill.
findings.recommendation: Attach last DR exercise results or schedule a tabletop before CAB closure.
